title: ranunculus propinquus subsp. subborealis
intro: Ranunculus propinquus subsp. subborealis, also known as the Northern buttercup, is a plant species within the Ranunculus genus. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus propinquus subsp. subborealis include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tinctures, infusions, and salves, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment for any medical condition.
